title: hotdogs modpack
description: The mods and configs used by world renowned Hypixel Skyblock streamer Content Out of Context (hotdog2500).
body:
# hotdogs modpack

This modpack are the mods and configs used by world renowned Hypixel Skyblock streamer Content Out of Context (hotdog2500). This is where the updated mod pack will be, so no more waiting for a yearly upload!!

Some of the things I love about my modpack 
- The clean & minimalist look
- Helpful dungeons features
- General Skyblock QOL features

This mod pack is for anyone who loves Hypixel Skyblock and wants amazing configs, or people that have seen my content and love how my game looks!

Depending on your monitor resolution, and preference of GUI scale and full-screen mode, you might need to reconfigure some GUI elements.

If you need help with anything related or unrelated to this mod pack, please join my Discord server and I can assist you!

Find my channel here: https://www.youtube.com/@contentoutofcontext
